subcodes.first_line: Glorified be God! The signs of grandeur and wondrous, resplendent tokens are witnessed. This is the Day of the manifestation of the celestial Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله آثار عظمت و آیات لمیعه بدیعه مشاهده میشود امروز روز ظهور ملکوت سمع
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
